radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription plan radio buttons section, including the list of plan options, their visual style, selection behavior, and indicator placement.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio selection indicator within each button. Recognized values are "left" (indicator on the left side), "right" (indicator on the right side), and "none" (no indicator shown). Defaults to left if unrecognized or absent.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

buttons.description: Ordered list of radio button items representing subscription plan options. Each item references a subscription button configuration by id and defines visual styling for selected/deselected states.

badge.description: Optional badge label displayed on the radio button, typically used to show promotional text like a discount percentage. Supports a v3 variant with enhanced visual styling and deselected-state visibility control.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

color.description: Text color of the badge label when the radio button is in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge label when the radio button is in the deselected state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

variant.description: Badge layout variant. When set to "v3", a version-3 badge style is used with adjusted positioning, rounded corners, and support for visibility toggling on deselect. Any other value uses the default badge style.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true and variant is "v3", the badge is hidden when the radio button is deselected. When false, the badge remains visible in the deselected state with deselected colors applied.

text.description: Display text shown inside the badge label on the radio button (e.g. a discount or promotional tag).

selected_bg_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage (e.g. a design-token path or hex color).

disabled_text_color.description: Text color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

selected_border_color.description: Border/stroke color applied to the radio button when it is in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is initially selected when the screen is rendered. Exactly one button in the list should have this set to true.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, the radio button is rendered at a larger height with bolder typography (T6 BOLD for price, T4 SEMI_BOLD for subtitle) and adjusted border radius. When false or null, standard height and typography are used.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionButtonApiModel from the "subscription_button" remote settings list. Each radio button item resolves its full button data (CTA colors, package info) from this id.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

border_color.description: Border/stroke color applied to the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Value is a color string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.

gradient_type.description: Determines the gradient background drawn behind the badge. When set to "gold", a gold-colored badge background is used. Other known values like "plus" or "pro" resolve to CascadeGradients by name. An empty or unrecognized value falls back to the PRIMARY gradient.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting (double-tapping) a radio button immediately initiates the purchase flow for that subscription package without requiring a separate CTA button tap.

type.description: Determines which radio button UI component is inflated. When set to "tiers_style", an OptimusHalfRadioButtonComponent is used; any other value (or absent) uses the default SubscriptionRadioButtonComponent.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the trial-reminder toggle, sharing the same remote settings key and model structure as switch_package_toggle. Its default enabled state is false (unlike switch_package_toggle which defaults to true).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to false), the toggle is not loaded. When enabled, it allows the user to opt in or out of a free-trial reminder, switching between enabled and disabled state configurations.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionToggleApiModel from the "offer_promotion_toggle" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration reference for placeholder text displayed near the toggle component. The resolved SubscriptionTitleApiModel provides text and color via its title TextConfigApiModel.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the text is not loaded. When enabled, it provides a TextConfig (text and color) that is rendered as descriptive text associated with the toggle area.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionTitleApiModel from the "offer_toggle_placeholder_text" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration, used to match a touchpoint name to its layout. The repository looks up the array item whose content_id equals the requested screen name; if no match is found it falls back to the item with content_id "default".

footer.description: Configuration reference for a footer component. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed or rendered by the Optimus screen implementation.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component would be enabled. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier for looking up a footer component from remote settings. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

banner.description: Configuration reference for the top-area media banner of the offer screen. The resolved SubscriptionBannerApiModel provides a media type ("image", "video", "gif", "lottie", or "reviews") and a list of banner values (URL, action deep-link, placeholder).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the banner is not loaded. When enabled, the banner renders media content (image, video, gif, lottie, or reviews carousel) at the top of the screen.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionBannerApiModel from the "offer_screen_banners" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

description.description: Configuration reference for a description component. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed or rendered by the Optimus screen implementation.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component would be enabled. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier for looking up a description component from remote settings. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

title.description: Configuration reference for the main title text shown below the banner/tab-switcher area. The resolved SubscriptionTitleApiModel provides text content and color via its title TextConfigApiModel.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the title text view is hidden (GONE). When enabled, the title is rendered as centered text with T6 typography and SEMI_BOLD font weight.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionTitleApiModel from the "offer_screen_titles" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

close_button.description: Configuration reference for the close (dismiss) button overlaid on the offer screen. The resolved CloseButtonModel controls visibility, alignment ("left" or "right"), top and side margins, and an optional custom icon URL.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button configuration is fetched from remote settings. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the component is not loaded and a default close button is shown. The resolved CloseButtonModel separately controls visibility via its own show field.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding CloseButtonModel from the "subscription_screen_close_button" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

subtitle.description: Configuration reference for the subtitle text shown below the title. The resolved SubscriptionTitleApiModel provides text content and color via its subtitle TextConfigApiModel.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the subtitle text view is hidden (GONE). When enabled, the subtitle is rendered as centered text with T5 typography and MEDIUM font weight.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionTitleApiModel from the "offer_screen_subtitles" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration reference for the banner placeholder overlay that renders text (title), an optional badge image, and an optional gradient shadow on top of the banner image/video area.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder component is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the component is not loaded. When the component is loaded, it renders overlay text, an optional badge image, and an optional bottom-to-top gradient shadow on top of the banner area.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionBannerPlaceholderApiModel from the "offer_banner_placeholder_text" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

secondary_button.description: Configuration reference for the secondary action button shown below the subtitle. The resolved SubscriptionSecondaryButtonApiModel provides text, color, an optional deep-link action, and a touchpoint string for analytics.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the button is hidden (GONE). When enabled, it renders an underlined text button below the subtitle. Tapping it either opens a deep-link action or shows the subscription tiers half-screen fragment.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionSecondaryButtonApiModel from the "offer_screen_secondary_button" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.

logo.description: Configuration reference for a logo component. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed or rendered by the Optimus screen implementation.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component would be enabled. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier for looking up a logo component from remote settings. This field is declared in the data model but is not currently consumed by OptimusScreenRepoImpl.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the package-switching toggle that lets users alternate between two subscription offer configurations (e.g. with/without a promotion). Each toggle state has its own data (title, subtitle, description, package ID) and view properties (text color, accent color).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the switch-package toggle is fetched and displayed. When false (or absent, defaults to true), the toggle is not loaded. When enabled, the toggle allows the user to switch between two subscription package variants with different titles, subtitles, descriptions, and package IDs defined in its enabled and disabled states.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability bitmask. Not used by application logic; reserved for the Compose runtime.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the corresponding SubscriptionToggleApiModel from the "offer_promotion_toggle" remote settings list. Must match the id field of one of those remote entries.
